subcodes.first_line: The breezes of Divine Revelation have encompassed the world, yet the servants remain heedless and veiled from that which was set down in the Books of old [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفحات وحی عالم را اخذ نموده ولکن عباد از آن غافل و محجوب آنچه در کتب از قبل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prophecy and fulfillment
